channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Series of pot holes and poor road surface causing cars to swerve onto oncoming traffic to avoid, 11th March
item.description:
Series of pot holes and poor road surface causing cars to swerve onto oncoming traffic to avoid the pot holes have been previously repaired and have now failed vehicles are getting damaged due to the road conditions here especially for residents who use this daily
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs & Sofa dump, 11th March
item.description:
Chairs, rubbish and sofa dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle been left and in bad state of repair, 11th March
item.description:
Car is untaxed, not declared as SORN and is it a bad state. Potential hazard and illegally parked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sellindge Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropdown kerb to road., 11th March
item.description:
The angle from the drop down kerb to the road is wrong. The road camber is too high, resulting in my car scraping underneath when entering and exiting my drive. This has damaged my car , at a cost of almost £500. See photo of MOT report.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keynsham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car - flat tyres no MOT, 11th March
item.description:
This car has been here for at least 6 months and has not moved. It is full of rubbish has flat tyres and no MOT parked on the public highway it’s parked in Partridge Road Sidcup

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Partridge Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Door number 164 and 162, 11th March
item.description:
The lady keeps corns on the road taking around 3 car space for nothing. We have problem parking our car.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building debris, 11th March
item.description:
Council keep saying - dealt with. IT HAS NOT BEEN DEALT WITH Stones and building debris from recent pavement and road works are left all in the side of the road and pavements from the alleyway up to 14 Rochester Avenue (old civic centre) on both sides of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12,14, Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary 3-way traffic lights not operational, 11th March
item.description:
Again on 11/3/26 at 19:00 - The temporary traffic lights in place at the Hollies avenue road closure are not operational. no lights are illuminated at all 3 ways of traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123A, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolley full of waste, 11th March
item.description:
This has been here for two days - fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes and cracked road, 11th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes and cracked road all along whippendell way. Dangerous as impossible to avoid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Whippendell Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep Potholes, 11th March
item.description:
2 Potholes around drain cover...very hard to avoid when turning into broomhill road from Orpington high street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 120-122, High Street, Goddington, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in bin area, 11th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in bin area. Bins are full of waste so no room got actual households who they are for.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dumped next to special school, fridge and wood, 11th March
item.description:
Wooden pallets reported has not been fixed, now more occured there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Passage, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed drain, 11th March
item.description:
Collapsed drain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Renforth Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned vehicle/ untaxed, 11th March
item.description:
There is a vehicle which has been parked for months. it’s untaxed also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitebeam Avenue, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Street light outside 1, Eastmead Close not working., 11th March
item.description:
Street light outside 1 Eastmead Close, BR1 2JG is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter strewn everywhere, 11th March
item.description:
There is litter everywhere in the underpass. It makes our neighbourhood look appealing, uncared for and unsafe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Fly tipping of bulky bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes in the middle of the road outside no 1 Abbey Crescent. The holes are getting bigger due to major building works taking place with large lorries, diggers coming in and out and using the junction of Kentish Road as a turning point. The potholes cannot be avoided as cars are parked both sides of the road. The pavement can also not be used during extensive rain as the drains overflow. Pedestrians have no option but to cross the road which means dodging the holes. Please repair ASAP. Thanks!!, 11th March
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Crescent, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car consistently parking illegally in park, 11th March
item.description:
This car regularly parks on the grass in the park next to Alexis street near one of the street lamps. This damages the grass and often leaves unsightly tire tracks in a shared public space. I would say this happens 10+ times a month. Please can this be reported and the owner fined? It’s really antisocial and not fair on those using the park appropriately. Thanks so much! :)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
